text: Put the crisps' packet in the bowl
Pick up the yellow cup and put it on top of the toaster
Get the red sauce bottle and put in the blue cup
Put the grey building block on the table
Turn the iron to the right and then press on the button of the iron
Pick up the square plush toy on the left and put it on top of the square push toy in the middle
Use the right white towel to wipe the pan
Pick up the elastic and put it around the bottle
